places.name: Emily’s Bridge
places.description: This New England covered bridge is home to the tale of a jilted lover known to haunt the area.

places.name: Mount Mansfield
places.description: The highest peak in the state of Vermont has some interesting features.

places.name: Trapp Family Lodge
places.description: Vermont's hills are alive with the sound of music at this historic hotel.

places.name: Smugglers’ Notch
places.description: A mountain pass used by Prohibition-era bootleggers to facilitate traffic into and out of Canada from Vermont.
